arts.sum: Dean Henderson thinks there is plenty more to come from Crystal Palace in the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Southampton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Crystal Palace vs Southampton preview including team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Southampton to battle Nottingham Forest, Benfica for 22-year-old Brazilian starlet?
arts.sum: Southampton are reportedly preparing an imminent bid for Palmeiras defender Vanderlan, who is also attracting interest from Nottingham Forest and Benfica.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace trio all priorities when it comes to loan moves in January transfer window
arts.sum: Left-footed Umeh, who arrived from Cork City at the end of the January transfer window in 2022, has been an unused substitute for Oliver Glasner’s team six times in the Premier League. A trio of Crystal Palace U21 players lead the list of academy loan priorities as we head into the January window.

arts.ttl: Team News: Crystal Palace vs. Southampton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Southampton.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace youngster set for League One switch
arts.sum: Imray started his career in non-league football before being signed by Palace at the age of 17. The 21-year-old has impressed on loan for Bromley in the first half of this season – proving he is too good to be plying his trade at League Two level.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all ten of this weekend's games
arts.sum: Jamie Griffith has picked out a score prediction for all 10 Premier League matches taking place on Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: Southampton ‘advance’ to sign player, formal offer could arrive in ‘coming days’ – Club want to sell him to Saints
arts.sum: Southampton want to sign Palmeiras defender Vanderlan in the winter market to improve their defence. That’s according to Bolavip in Brazil, who state the Premier League side ‘advance’ for the left-back’s transfer. Southampton’s interest in the 22-year-old will please Palmeiras as they are looking to sell him in the upcoming window. arts.ttl: Adam Sells’ talking points from Crystal Palace’s 0-0 draw at Bournemouth - signing attacking talent a priority in transfer window
arts.sum: One in three is a good target in terms of shutouts and from 18 games, the Eagles are a couple short in that respect. Crystal Palace drew 0-0 at Bournemouth on Boxing Day. Here are Adam Sells’ talking points from the Premier League stalemate.
